message: Jake
Vendor
Serial Murder Case
I came to Little Italy once again, undeterred.
It was just one street away from my office in Chinatown, not a bother at all.
This was becoming as routine as my visits to Little Italy.

This street lined with Italian restaurants is the most lively street in Little Italy.
It doesn't seem to have anything particularly unusual.
I've completely gotten used to this street.
As usual, the one in charge of the shop is here.
I wonder if this is his personal business?
It feels a bit cramped, but magazines stands are often like this.
Italian, American, Chinese,
magazines from various countries are crammed together.
Among all these magazines, some are probably going to be discontinued in a few months.
Hey there, dude! You've been coming around a lot lately.
Yeah, just some stuff I had to take care of.
So, you still haven’t been able to meet her?
It’s not like that.
Hah.
Oh, dude, you're surprisingly not popular, huh?
What are you gonna buy for me today?
Dude,
if you just came to bother me, I’ll have to ask you to leave.
Dude,
I’m not interested in just watching.
It's kind of sudden to say something like that.
Everything I told you last time is still the same.
I wonder if Anna is around.
I’m worried about how long Anna has been gone. Where could she be and what is she doing?
If Anna doesn’t come back, my business is going down the drain.
There was just a murder case in New York too. Why do these incidents never seem to stop?
Why do people end up killing each other?
Maybe it's better to just wait a while?
She still hasn’t returned, has she?
I've already visited Anna's house once. I hope she's there this time.
So I pressed the doorbell with that wish in mind.
But unfortunately, there was no answer, and it seems she's not home.
Peeking into the mailbox, I found it stuffed full of mail.
I looked into the mailbox before ringing the doorbell, and it was still stuffed with mail.
Guess I’ll have to come back later.
Sighing to myself, I returned to the street.
Anna still hasn’t returned. When will I be able to meet her?
Ｖ＝
